title: GMS Week 48 - TOPPING OUT!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 22/11/2021
Image reference: 2021-11-22_gms-week-48-topping-out_img1.jpg
The recent noteworthy drop in the Indian ship recycling market seems to have reverberated across the sub-continent recycling sector this week, as competing markets start to reverse their vessel offerings in near unison. Bangladesh has remained largely quiet for much of the week as they observe the ongoing price reductions, whilst local Recyclers expect further falls ahead. Indian steel plate prices have declined by nearly USD 45/LDT over recent weeks, leaving Alang Buyers rather spooked and fearful to maintain previous offers, or even consider offering on any fresh units.
